title: Lead Investment Banker at Acuite Ratings

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Acuite Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Acuite Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Acuite Ratings:
Acuite Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings!
